notes: Production run 7-13wk-INTRANSIT-EST landed at In Transit (FK->Carriacou) — counts confirmed.
note: IN TRANSIT, COUNTED. 7/13-7/15 FK production week, picked up 7/17 (BOL 1215199), lands Carriacou 7/22. Per-batch actuals: GR 7/13 390+396+402=1,188u; FO 7/13 400u; FO 7/14 402+378+400+404=1,584u; BUF 7/15 479+475+440=1,394u; FO 7/15 397u. Week total 4,963u = 827 cs (BUF 232 / FO 397 / GR 198). Less Neighborly COTTO-1114 (40/40/20 = 100 cs) = 727 cs in transit. Supersedes the 738-cs estimate, which was derived from same-flavour priors and came within 1.2%. ON ARRIVAL: log an Out from here and an In to Brooklyn against the signed receiving slip.
